title: Minky 3.5L Caddy, Kitchen Food Waste Caddy, Recycle Bins for Kitchen, Multipurpose Storage Caddy, Removable Bag Retention Ring & Sturdy Handle, Choice of Colours, Made in the UK
features: LARGE CAPACITY - With its generous 3.5L capacity, this caddy offers ample space to store all your belongings in one place - a perfect solution for keeping your essentials organized & within reach.
MULTIPURPOSE CADDY - Designed to store a variety of items, from stationery to DIY spares, first aid supplies to beauty products, it offers a convenient solution for keeping everything in one place.

BAG RETENTION RING - Designed with a removable bag retention ring, it's perfect for storing food waste using biodegradable bags. Say goodbye to messy countertops & hello to a cleaner, greener kitchen.
HIGH QUALITY - Its sturdy carry handle makes it a breeze to transport & the smooth surface not only adds a touch of elegance but also makes cleaning a breeze, saving you time and effort.

MADE IN THE UK – Crafted with precision and expertise, our products are both: quality & durability. Our rich heritage and experience in textile manufacture have made us the preferred choice since 1941
description: Product Description Minky 3.5L Caddy - Dusty Pink Keep your essentials organized and within reach with this spacious caddy. With its generous 3.5L capacity, it offers ample space to store all your belongings in one place. Sturdy Carry Handle Its sturdy carry handle allows you to effortlessly transport your caddy from one place to another with ease. The smooth surface simplifies cleaning, eliminating any unnecessary hassle. Stylish & Practical Design The internal removable bag retention ring makes it ideal for storing food waste with a disposable bag. The convenient lid can stay open, allowing you to easily dispose of waste while cooking or cleaning up. Available In Six Different Colours

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always use gloves when handling food waste. Avoid placing sharp objects in the caddy. Keep the caddy clean to prevent the growth of harmful microorganisms. Do not overfill the caddy to prevent spills. Store the caddy in a well-ventilated area to control odors.
